No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to eradicating poverty.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to ending hunger or improving nutrition.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to health or well-being outcomes.

Quality Education.reason: The course directly aims to increase academic writing and reading skills, fostering critical thinking, which is core to quality tertiary education (Targets 4.3, 4.4).

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to energy access or sustainability.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops critical thinking and advanced writing skills, which are foundational for productive employment and decent jobs (Target 8.5).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course explicitly integrates 'AI tools to enhance writing' and 'ChatGPT for in-class revision,' directly supporting technological capability and innovation (Target 9.5).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: A module focuses on 'Immigrants and Transnational Students,' directly addressing social inclusion and migration themes relevant to Targets 10.2 and 10.7.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to responsible consumption or production patterns.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to climate change or action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to marine life or ocean conservation.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The inclusion of 'Writing Ethics/Plagiarism' promotes academic integrity and accountability, supporting the development of effective institutions (Target 16.6).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course overview explicitly mentions 'SDGs,' indicating an effort to raise awareness and share knowledge, contributing to global partnerships (Target 17.16).
